name: Mao Bao Inc.
summary: Mao Bao Inc. manufactures and sells household and personal care products in Taiwan. The company offers laundry cleaning products, such as detergent, liquid soaps, soft essence, clothes stains, cold wash, and hand wash products; dishwashing liquids; kitchen cleaning, universal cleaning, bathroom cleaning, antibacterial cleaning, and appliances cleaning products; and floor cleaners. It also provides organic anti-mosquito repellents, oils, and gels; and personal cleaning products, such as antibacterial moisturizing hand wash. The company was founded in 1978 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
